feed.title: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, and Claude Skills Hub

entry.title: adcp-client
entry.content: Adds the /adcp skill for calling AdCP advertising agent tools over MCP or A2A, running protocol compliance scenarios, and querying the AdCP registry. Includes built-in test agents for zero-config use. Backed by the `@adcp/sdk` npm package (formerly `@adcp/client`).

entry.title: pi-stuff
entry.content: pi-stuff — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: sdna
entry.content: SDNA (Sanctuary DNA) - Gnostic agent workflow DSL with skills for chain development

entry.title: klanker
entry.content: Klanker Maker sandbox platform — agent-side email/Slack/operator skills + operator-side init/vscode/desktop/cluster skills

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: nx-plugin-for-aws
entry.content: Scaffold and build cloud-native applications on AWS using @aws/nx-plugin generators. Covers workspace creation, project scaffolding with TypeScript, Python, React, CDK, Terraform, and more.

entry.title: sidecar
entry.content: Project-agnostic AI coding sidecar — SELF-CONTAINED Claude Code plugin: governance hooks (guards + injects) AND the sidecar CLI itself (bin/ · cli/ · lib/ · modules/ · config/ · templates/ · styles/) ship as ONE unit. Hooks run the plugin's own bundled CLI via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, so `/plugin update` + reload refreshes everything together — no per-project copy, no separate `sidecar self-update`. Slash commands ship as BARE `/cmd` via `sidecar shadow` (user-scope ~/.claude/commands), NOT plugin-namespaced — see `commands: []` below. Falls back to a global `sidecar` on PATH when present.

entry.title: nas-llm
entry.content: LLM Wiki Knowledge Base — planning, ops scripts, and E2E checklist for the DESKTOP-AT1P1UD deployment of nashsu/llm_wiki

entry.title: korean-dart
entry.content: OpenDART 83개 API → 15개 MCP 도구. 금융감독원 전자공시(DART) 기반 AI 리서치 — 공시 검색·재무·XBRL + 버핏 애널리스트 프레임(insider_signal · disclosure_anomaly · buffett_quality_snapshot) + HWP/PDF 첨부 마크다운화

entry.title: more-paper-workflow-pro-skill
entry.content: 中文/双语论文的证据闭环学术工作流：从定题、检索、下载、Zotero 到写作与引用审计，全程基于真实文献。

entry.title: lore
entry.content: Share Claude Code and Cowork sessions to Lore and read threads back.

entry.title: audiobook-organizer
entry.content: Expert Claude Code assistance for the audiobook-organizer codebase — shared context loading, Go/DB/docs/PII specialist agents.

entry.title: heavyskill
entry.content: Heavy Thinking as the Inner Skill in Agentic Harness — spawns K independent parallel reasoning agents then performs critical sequential deliberation. Implementation of arXiv:2605.02396v1.

entry.title: agent-rally-point
entry.content: Agent Rally Point — repo-local coordination surface for parallel coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini). Records claims, checks write boundaries, routes handoffs, and exposes room state via the rally CLI. Skills: agent-rally-point (per-session loop), rally-workflows (fan-out + dynamic-workflows protocol), mini-loop (per-task quality gate). Advisory-only hooks auto-fire on SessionStart + PreToolUse to surface room awareness and deconflict before edits — never blocks. Backend: rally CLI (cargo install --path crates/rally-cli).

entry.title: dependabit
entry.content: AI-powered tracker for external informational dependencies. Bootstrap Dependabit in any repo to discover, track, and monitor documentation sites, research papers, API schemas, and reference implementations.

entry.title: claude-patent-creator-standalone
entry.content: Complete self-contained patent creation system - NO MCP server required. Uses Claude Code skills, agents, commands, and hooks.

entry.title: b00t
entry.content: b00t plugin for Claude Code - extreme programming agent framework with datum system, direnv pattern, and DRY philosophy

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Complete collection of battle-tested Claude Code configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner - agents, skills, hooks, and rules evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

entry.title: vibe-center-skills
entry.content: Vibe Coding Control Center - Custom skills for session management

entry.title: rubio-standards
entry.content: Rubio-Enterprises repository standards

entry.title: zmr
entry.content: Agent-native mobile UI automation and verification for Expo, React Native, Flutter, and native Android/iOS apps. Gives Claude Code eyes and hands on emulators and simulators: semantic snapshots, typed actions, waits, assertions, and replayable traces.

entry.title: kei
entry.content: Kei 言語を学習なしで正しく書くためのスキル。func/契約/エフェクト/型/失敗処理の最小十分セットと、kei check による検証ループを提供する(v0.4: 論理和 || / 剰余 % 演算子対応)。

entry.title: rill
entry.content: Skills for developing and querying projects in the Rill business intelligence platform

entry.title: cinematic-scroll
entry.content: Build cinematic, scroll-driven websites — pinned chapter reveals, multi-depth parallax, 3D tilt, environment-morphing backgrounds, and full release/launch pages. The motion grammar is the skill; the aesthetic is always the user's. Single self-contained scroll sections (Mode A) or a full Next.js release site with GSAP/Lenis + AI-generated visuals (Mode B), via a 5-phase gated pipeline with taste guardrails, 12 scroll patterns, and a transform/opacity performance budget.

entry.title: planwright
entry.content: Autopilot for spec-driven development. The human signs off and merges; planwright flies the spec.

entry.title: rauf
entry.content: Authoring, review, guidance, and loop-operation skills for rauf autonomous coding loops. rauf owns the backlog contract; these skills serve both the repo-wide ad-hoc flow and feature-pipeline tools that delegate to them.

entry.title: happytrails
entry.content: Live browser-based viewer for all agent tool activity with three switchable view modes

entry.title: pure-cognitive-oil
entry.content: Portable cognitive infrastructure for agent harnesses: graph-connected references, bootstrap context, routing, verification gates, and PCO skills.

entry.title: kaizen
entry.content: Multi-agent improvement plugin — runs Atelier's methodology against any git repository by URL

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,651 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entry.title: gsd-core
entry.content: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entry.title: clickhouse-monitor
entry.content: Specialized assistance for the chmonitor dashboard - a real-time monitoring dashboard for ClickHouse clusters

entry.title: atelier
entry.content: Shared workspace methodology and dev workflow for human-AI development teams

entry.title: gemini-manager
entry.content: Enables Claude Code to manage Gemini CLI as an intern. Claude acts as manager/architect while Gemini does all coding work.

entry.title: exarchos
entry.content: A local-first SDLC workflow harness — structured, durable state for coding agents, with convergence gates, agent teams, and full audit trail.

entry.title: cc-proxy
entry.content: Z.ai and OpenRouter proxy for Claude Code — stateless local router with manual /model switching and per-provider auth.

entry.title: issuesdb-plugin
entry.content: Skills for grooming and working issuesdb issues end-to-end — from triage through PR

entry.title: all-skills
entry.content: Meta-plugin that installs all skills from all plugins in the marketplace

entry.title: e2e-skills
entry.content: AI agent testing toolkit to generate, review, and debug Playwright and Cypress E2E tests. Four agent skills: generate tests from scratch with live browser exploration, explicit user approval, and first-run scaffolding of project testing conventions (AGENTS.md E2E section + seed spec) for consistent AI generation across Claude Code, Codex, and Playwright Agents; review existing specs against 24 anti-patterns grouped by P0/P1/P2 severity — P0 must-fix (name-assertion mismatch, missing Then, error swallowing, Cypress uncaught:exception suppression, always-passing assertions, bypass patterns, focused test leak, missing assertions, missing auth setup, missing await on expect, missing await on action), P1 should-fix (raw DOM queries, hard-coded sleeps, flaky test patterns, inconsistent POM usage, hardcoded credentials, direct page action API, expect.soft overuse, module-level mutable state in test utilities, unmocked real-backend writes, optimistic UI without call proof), P2 nice-to-fix (YAGNI + zombie specs, manually-captured session-file dependency, fixture ignores render guards); debug failed Playwright tests from playwright-report/; debug failed Cypress tests from cypress/reports/. Built for E2E test automation, flaky test root-cause analysis, false-positive detection, and test smell scanning.

entry.title: posthog
entry.content: Access PostHog analytics, feature flags, experiments, error tracking, and insights directly from your AI coding tool. Optionally capture Claude Code sessions to PostHog LLM Analytics.

entry.title: beagle
entry.content: Code review skills and verification workflows for Python, Go, React, and AI frameworks

entry.title: llm-ux-benchmark
entry.content: Verilen siteyi sıfırdan vanilla static (HTML/CSS/JS) olarak yeniden kodlatır; Codex 0-100 puanlar (Teknik kalite / UI / Kod okunabilirliği), PageSpeed manuel girilir.

entry.title: ai
entry.content: Personal AI dev team: UX designer, frontend, backend, and staff engineer agents plus the shared TDD/DDD/pragmatic-SOLID/DRY-KISS skills they operate by. Requires the superpowers and figma companion plugins.

entry.title: one-click-improve
entry.content: Agent task harness for coding tasks: preflight the task, loop until done — scoped tasks, task memory, and surface-aware execution.

entry.title: bvd-sex-age-analysis
entry.content: Generate the standard BVD Sex and Age epidemiological PowerPoint slide deck from a DHIS2 Tracker line-list export (Ebola/MVE outbreak, DRC). Runs all reconciliation quality gates before producing the deck.

entry.title: agntux-asana
entry.content: Asana tasks and projects in your AgntUX knowledge store.

entry.title: agntux-gmail
entry.content: Brings your Gmail into AgntUX. Spots emails that need a reply and drafts responses you review and send yourself.

entry.title: literature-trends
entry.content: Abductive argumentation-based trend analysis — trace hypothesis evolution across time windows in keyword-tagged paper clusters.

entry.title: strategic-operator
entry.content: Engagement-manager-grade thought-partner and operator toolkit: finance-performance, risk-regulatory, strategy-building, gtm-commercial, operations-org, growth-transformation, fundraising-capital, market-intelligence, people-talent, exec-deliverables, and the shared house-style standard. Investor-grade, answer-first, with tested Python tools and consistency lints. Tuned for fintech, payments, banking, lending, and SaaS/cloud/AI across Europe, the GCC, and Africa.

entry.title: video-recap-skills
entry.content: Turn any video into a Chinese-narration recap on ffmpeg + one Xiaomi MiMo API key: understanding (ASR + VLM) -> narration -> cut -> voiceover -> assemble. A bundle of independent skills + a thin orchestrator. Runs on macOS, Linux, and Windows.

entry.title: deep-reviewer-seek
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: create-adaptable-composable
entry.content: Create a library-grade Vue composable that accepts maybe-reactive inputs (MaybeRef / MaybeRefOrGetter) so callers can pass a plain value, ref, or getter. Normalize inputs with toValue()/toRef() inside reactive effects (watch/watchEffect) to keep behavior predictable and reactive. Use this skill when user asks for creating adaptable or reusable composables.

entry.title: bkper-cli
entry.content: Adds Bkper CLI guidance for safe Bkper data, reporting, app development, and accounting-support workflows in Claude Code.

entry.title: vue-jsx-best-practices
entry.content: JSX syntax in Vue (e.g., class vs className, JSX plugin config).

entry.title: manifold3d-mcp
entry.content: MCP server + skill for designing 3D-printable models with manifold-3d. Validates LLM-generated TypeScript snippets and streams the result to a live three.js preview with STL/3MF export.

entry.title: vue-options-api-best-practices
entry.content: Vue 3 Options API style (data(), methods, this context). Each reference shows Options API solution only.

entry.title: nativeui
entry.content: Author native iOS + Android apps with NativeUI: generate plain HTML/CSS, import it to a NativeUI project, export native screens, and wire backend through the NuiBackend interface without touching generated UI.

entry.title: garmin-bud
entry.content: Talk to your Garmin Connect data — MCP server plus setup and fitness coach skills for Claude Code.

entry.title: staff-engineer
entry.content: Free squidcode skills: squidapp (scaffold a Next.js + NestJS/Prisma + Postgres app) + squidops (toolchain doctor), with squidup + squidupgrade.

entry.title: agntux-notion
entry.content: Brings your Notion workspace into AgntUX, so tasks and updates show up in one place.

entry.title: agntux-core
entry.content: Your AgntUX home base. Set up with /agntux onboard, then use /agntux triage every day to see your action items.

entry.title: joomla
entry.content: Joomla 5+ / 6 / 7 extension development skill — components, modules, plugins, libraries, templates with modern MVC, PSR-4 namespaces, DI, and service providers.

entry.title: hephaestus
entry.content: Roman-named software-delivery team. One entry point (marcus) decomposes the goal, designs a named team, dispatches BA / dev / management / QA specialists, and synthesises the result. 22 sub-agents, hub-and-spoke.

entry.title: alpaca-trading
entry.content: Connects Claude Code to Alpaca's Trading and Market Data APIs over OAuth-protected MCP.

entry.title: delivery-metrics
entry.content: 在 AI 時代誠實衡量交付成效的 Claude Code 技能集。第一個技能 sprint-self-review 幫個人開發者用對 AI 免疫的流動/品質指標與判斷日誌，自評每個 sprint 的真實成效。

entry.title: agntux-imessage
entry.content: See the iMessages that need a reply, and draft responses safely.

entry.title: loops-workflow
entry.content: 7 階段閉環開發工作流：dispatch 決策樹分流 → goal/explore/plan/build/verify/iterate，階段間 human gate，.loops/ markdown 記憶體，build 紅綠分離，verify 多 reviewer fan-out + validator 二輪。

entry.title: wachines-skills
entry.content: Software factory toolkit for Claude Code: Postgres/Supabase & React/Next best practices, SQL-migration & security reviewers, docs architect, RPC-API contract, functional front QA, and the wachi-fabrica orchestrator — plus db/frontend/security subagents. Project-agnostic.

entry.title: theorems-harness
entry.content: Agent delivery surface for Theorems Harness capabilities, hooks, and MCP facade.

entry.title: epic
entry.content: Development orchestrator: a planner decomposes a large Epic into PR-sized, dependency-ordered tasks, and multiple runners autonomously implement them in parallel git worktrees, coordinating through a filesystem-backed state machine.

entry.title: agntux-calendly
entry.content: Track Calendly bookings, leads, and attendee status. Send cancellations and confirmations from AgntUX.

entry.title: codex-verify
entry.content: Independent verification for Claude Code: send plans, code diffs, and skill-rule drafts to Codex (GPT-5.5) for an adversarial PASS/FAIL review, with an optional GLM-5.2 fallback. The producer is never the reviewer.

entry.title: agntux-docusign
entry.content: DocuSign e-signature workflow in your AgntUX knowledge store.

entry.title: agntux-apple-notes
entry.content: Bring Apple Notes into AgntUX with one-click actions to create and update notes.

entry.title: discovery
entry.content: Product discovery skills — explore customer needs, map the opportunity space, brainstorm solutions, surface and test assumptions.

entry.title: scientific-literature
entry.content: Multi-source scientific literature search and ingestion: Europe PMC, PubMed, OpenAlex, bioRxiv/medRxiv, with optional semantic search via Voyage AI + Qdrant.

entry.title: vue-router-best-practices
entry.content: Vue Router 4 patterns, navigation guards, route params, and route-component lifecycle interactions.

entry.title: agntux-google-drive
entry.content: Bring your Google Drive files into your AgntUX knowledge store.

entry.title: agntux-sentry
entry.content: Sentry issues and observability in your AgntUX knowledge store.

entry.title: claude-status-bar-windows
entry.content: System-tray status indicator for Claude Code on Windows: animated icon, awaiting-permission dot, elapsed timer, and an always-on-top status pill.

entry.title: agntux-google-calendar
entry.content: Brings your Google Calendar into AgntUX with a daily look at the week ahead and everything you need to prepare.

entry.title: data
entry.content: Reusable data-engineering skills: ClickHouse/dbt query best practices.

entry.title: interactive-mcp
entry.content: Mirrors the OpenCode interactive MCP setup for Claude Code with repo docs/libs and dependency-graph tools, skills, and rules.

entry.title: tesserae-core
entry.content: Always-on portable engineering rules (universal + Python tiers). A SessionStart hook injects the bundled rule modules into every session and warns loudly when a required module is missing.

entry.title: agntux-dropbox
entry.content: Bring your Dropbox files into your AgntUX knowledge store, and act on them — share, organize, request — right from triage.

entry.title: a-comm-skills
entry.content: A-Comm Claude Code skills — telemetry-stripped, de-branded pack of 24 skills for engineering, design review, and shipping workflows.

entry.title: odoo-ai-skills
entry.content: A Claude Code skills suite for Odoo 17/18/19 development with an AI agent: read ground truth from the running instance first (fields, MRO/super chains, views, security, runtime flow, runtime state + exception post-mortem, reverse field impact, effective per-user/company security, module load state), build the smallest correct change, prove it with tests, and review it before merge — never guess. Covers models, scaffolding, views, OWL, public web (controllers/website/portal), security, reports, data, migration, performance, deploy (incl. odoo.sh), and domain playbooks.

entry.title: vue-debug-guides
entry.content: Vue 3 debugging and error handling for runtime errors, warnings, async failures, and SSR/hydration issues. Use when diagnosing or fixing Vue issues.

entry.title: agntux-canva
entry.content: Brings your Canva designs and comments into AgntUX so you see what needs your attention.

entry.title: argus
entry.content: Greek-named permanent QA team. One entry point (odysseus) picks an engagement mode and fires parallel surface×mode lanes (UI / API / perf / security / a11y / DB-gated / white-box-gated) for black-box hunting plus regression automation. 23 sub-agents.

entry.title: core
entry.content: Generic agent behavior (delivered via hooks), reusable skills, and the /setup project scaffolder.

entry.title: agent-team
entry.content: A domain-agnostic agent-team scaffold built around the Planner → Generator → Evaluator loop. Reusable role agents (planner, generator, evaluator, design-evaluator, coordinator) and a reference end-to-end workflow with slash commands. Local-first; the same agents deploy headless to Claude Managed Agents via scripts/cma. Copy it and fill in your vertical.

entry.title: agntux-jira
entry.content: Brings your Jira issues into AgntUX — comment, transition, assign, edit, or log time without leaving your workflow.

entry.title: forge-state
entry.content: Lab bench for open-source projects. Inbound intake from Slack 🧪 reactions plus wild-source harvesters (GitHub code search, RSS feeds, curated author watchlist). Nightly, forge researches, clones, builds inside a sealed Docker sandbox, runs an experiment, packages it into something runnable, and ships a writeup + deployable artifact. Includes forge-introspector — reads its own capability walls across published experiments and proposes work orders to overcome them. Build failures are kept as findings, not discarded.

entry.title: oh-my-claudecode
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.title: idc
entry.content: IDC workflow (Think → Plan → Build → Recirculator, drained by Autorun) — a guardrail-framed, tracker-driven, goal-contract development pipeline as an installable Claude Code plugin

entry.title: dev-spec-kit
entry.content: Spec-driven development with a Verified Traceability Graph — every requirement bound to a passing check. EARS specs, evidence-bound done, drift detection, graph-derived PRs.

entry.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
entry.content: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

entry.title: crawlie
entry.content: Run fast technical-SEO and AI-search (GEO) audits from your agent. Bundles the crawlie MCP server (auto-installed via npx) plus skills for full-site audits, broken-link fixes, pre-launch gates, and GEO readiness.

entry.title: yodogawa
entry.content: AIネイティブIDE向け仕様駆動開発スキル集

entry.title: crucible-suite
entry.content: Complete writing system for epic fantasy novels using the Crucible Structureâ€”a 36-beat narrative framework with three interwoven story strands. Includes planning, outlining, prose writing with bi-chapter reviews, and editing.

entry.title: honestweek
entry.content: Honest, git-verified, private-by-default weekly work summaries from your AI coding sessions.

entry.title: agentic-qe
entry.content: Agentic Quality Engineering — AI-powered QE platform with 60 specialized agents, 75+ skills, sublinear coverage analysis, ReasoningBank pattern learning, and deep MCP integration for Claude Code and 11 coding agent platforms

entry.title: autonomous-fleet
entry.content: Portable multi-agent engineering framework for fully-autonomous coding runs across orchestration tools. A tool-agnostic core engine, per-runtime adapters (Claude Code, Codex, Grok, Orca), and 3 shipped mission skills (doc-sync, test-coverage, adversarial-review-and-fix) that compose into multi-step engineering campaigns; 12 more missions ship as exploratory docs pending real-run promotion.

entry.title: beacon
entry.content: Accessibility + AEO inspection for Claude Code. Lighthouse-style 0-100 scoring across 10 categories, interactive HTML reports, jurisdiction-aware WCAG context, framework-specific fixes, and a PostToolUse hook that auto-checks a11y when you edit UI files.

entry.title: drt-hub
entry.content: Skills for drt — Reverse ETL for the code-first data stack

entry.title: substreams
entry.content: Agent skills for Substreams development — build, debug, and deploy high-performance blockchain data indexing and transformation on EVM, Solana, and NEAR chains.

entry.title: great_cto
entry.content: Engineering process for solo founders and teams up to 50 engineers. Agents do architecture, code review, QA, and security. You make two decisions per feature.

entry.title: dz
entry.content: Dzhuneyt's personal skills and agents — cross-agent skills plus Claude-only subagents.

entry.title: larch
entry.content: Multi-agent workflow automation for Claude Code: issue-anchored `/design` (one direct-drafting flow; plan-review panel), `/bug` (consumer issue-filing helper), `/deps` issue dependency audits, and `/implement` (positional `<issue-N>`, fixed 7200s Step 2 timeout, optional `--merge`, `--forked`, `--draft`, `--no-admin-fallback`, `--no-logs-commit`, `--coder`, `--run-id`). `/implement` Preflight reads the `larch:plan` block from the issue body; `/implement` Step 5 code review always uses the unified strict panel internally (public `--panel` argv removed).

entry.title: ai-config
entry.content: d-morrison's personal Claude Code skills (PR/review workflow, grading, reprexes, R-package helpers) and slash commands.

entry.title: gamedev-skills
entry.content: Battle-tested game-dev workflow skills for Claude Code: tiered S/M/L process with a self-correcting retrospective loop, Godot 4 headless testing patterns, human+agent shared-repo discipline, and superpowers x godot-mcp-enhanced toolchain orchestration

entry.title: agent-orchestra
entry.content: Multi-agent workflow system for Claude Code. Pipeline-based agent orchestration: Issue → Design → Plan → Implement → Review → PR.

entry.title: apple-skills
entry.content: Apple development skills for Claude Code and Codex — iOS 26+ APIs, SwiftUI, UIKit, Liquid Glass, SwiftData, and more.

entry.title: cc-reload
entry.content: Session continuity across context resets for Claude Code. Snapshots a session digest before /clear, /compact, or auto-compaction and auto-rehydrates it after. The non-looped companion to cc-repete — stands down whenever a cc-repete loop is active.

entry.title: xorio
entry.content: xorio development toolkit — dev workflows, testing, cleanup, polish, review, security

entry.title: video-intel
entry.content: YouTube video intelligence via Gemini: channel scanning, rich multimodal transcripts with on-screen content, concept taxonomy, hybrid search, and Bosnian/Croatian/Serbian subtitle translation. Three skills: video-intel (ingest/curate, runs in the plugin repo), video-intel-search (read-only, globally installable), translate-bcs (subtitle translation).

entry.title: cc-imessage-control
entry.content: Text yourself 'Claude <projectname>' OR 'skill <command>'. Your Mac (iMessage) or Linux box opens a new local Claude Code session with /remote-control enabled — 'Claude' mode opens the project; 'skill' mode runs a plugin's slash command in its project dir. Drive both from the Claude mobile app. No chat.db reading.

entry.title: kaizen
entry.content: Continuous improvement plugin for Claude Code — enforcement hooks, reflection workflows, dev workflow skills, and recursive self-improvement

entry.title: webrobot
entry.content: WebRobot ETL platform — pipeline builder, job management, stage catalog, agent management, dataset management

entry.title: claude-2x-statusline
entry.content: Modular statusline for Claude Code — peak hours, rate limits, rolling-window burn rate, cache reuse, plus a hook-injected narrator (rules + optional Haiku) that surfaces context-management advice above your prompt. Bilingual (English/Hebrew, locale auto-detect).

entry.title: dx
entry.content: Developer experience essentials: GitHub Actions debugging, conversation cloning/half-cloning, context handoffs, research (Reddit and Hacker News), and Claude Code version checks

entry.title: predicate
entry.content: Reusable agent rulesets (rules), skills, and workflows for agentic coding assistants.

entry.title: telegram-per-project
entry.content: Telegram channel for Claude Code with per-project bot isolation — each project gets its own bot, access policy, and message inbox.

entry.title: session-orchestrator
entry.content: Session-level orchestration — wave planning, VCS integration, quality gates, persistence, and safety checks

entry.title: leadbay
entry.content: AI lead discovery, qualification, and outreach prep on your Leadbay account.

entry.title: smith
entry.content: Spec-driven development for Claude Code — requirements, plans, and tasks that ship as working code.

entry.title: kagura-memory
entry.content: Kagura Memory Cloud plugin — session management, memory recall/save, and setup tools

entry.title: portaljs
entry.content: Agentic skills for building PortalJS data portals — recommend an architecture, scaffold a portal, add datasets, charts, and maps, connect a CKAN backend, deploy, and audit data quality.

entry.title: ai-brain-starter
entry.content: Set up or upgrade an AI-powered Obsidian vault with journaling, knowledge graphs, pattern recognition, and meeting workflows. Includes skills for daily journaling, weekly insights, graphify knowledge graphs, humanizer, and more.

entry.title: trinity-vsa-framework
entry.content: Trinity VSA/FPGA development framework with custom skills, hooks, and MCP integration for ternary computing

entry.title: elements-of-style
entry.content: Writing guidance based on William Strunk Jr.'s The Elements of Style (1918)

entry.title: scholar
entry.content: Statistical teaching workflows for Claude Code - exams, quizzes, slides, lectures, and course material generation

entry.title: playbook
entry.content: Operating playbook for non-technical founders working with Claude Code. Quarterback model — Claude proposes, you decide.

entry.title: driftwave
entry.content: A look-before-you-act coding loop for Claude Code: check what's there, what's asked, and the gap — then do it and verify. Clusters artifacts with H₀ persistent homology (real); the higher 'sheaf'/'H₁' layers are topology-inspired LLM heuristics. Guided by five axioms: NO_AVERAGING, UPWARD_FLOW, WAYPOINT_ROUTING, SHAPE_OVER_COUNT, ADAPTIVE_SCALE.

entry.title: bioassert
entry.content: Write bioassert assertions and wire them into Nextflow pipelines

entry.title: open-agreements
entry.content: Fill standard legal agreement templates and produce signable DOCX files. Supports Common Paper and Bonterms templates.

entry.title: agora
entry.content: Real-time communication with Agora SDKs — RTC, RTM, Conversational AI, and token generation

entry.title: sf-security-review-toolkit
entry.content: Skills that prepare an ISV partner for the AppExchange/AgentExchange security review end to end — autonomous multi-agent codebase audit, submission-artifact generation, scan orchestration, test-environment runbooks, and an honest readiness verdict.

entry.title: session-sync
entry.content: Cross-device synchronization for Claude Code sessions and settings via iCloud Drive

entry.title: finance-skills
entry.content: Financial analysis and trading skills — options payoff charts, stock correlations, market data via yfinance, Twitter/Discord/Telegram research, and generative UI widgets.

entry.title: 1password-env
entry.content: 1Password-backed secret management — replaces .env files with vault-backed hydration

entry.title: skill-repo
entry.content: Guide for structuring Netresearch skill repositories

entry.title: agentic-development-workflow
entry.content: Per-feature development lifecycle: design, launch, build, wrap.

entry.title: cre-skills
entry.content: Institutional-grade CRE skills library covering the full investment lifecycle: deal screening, underwriting, structuring, due diligence, capital markets, market research, asset management, leasing, investor relations, development, disposition, sourcing, tax, ESG, portfolio strategy, and daily operations. Includes Monte Carlo simulation, SEC Reg D compliance, property management ops, deal attribution tracking, 1031 pipeline management, distribution notice generation, fund-raise LP negotiation tracking, and emerging manager evaluation. Ships expert subagents, Python calculators, workflow chains, and orchestrator pipelines for multi-agent acquisition workflows.

entry.title: board-of-directors
entry.content: Strategic decision framework with 10 director archetypes (Musk, Altman, Hassabis, Li, Nadella, Huang, Pichai, Hoffman, Ng, Jobs) and 7 shared methodology skills. Orchestrated via /board or invoked per director. Not a substitute for professional advice.

entry.title: tinycloud
entry.content: Video understanding and editing via the tinycloud CLI (Cloudglue): watch/extract/search/ask/face over videos, captions, clips, collections, and one-command video workflows.

entry.title: learn-skills
entry.content: Agent skills that package evidence-backed pedagogical methodologies (explain-and-check, quiz-me, connect-to-what-you-know, ask-me-questions, learn-by-doing, linked-notes, flashcards) as workflows applied to code. The anti-cognitive-surrender layer: closes the comprehension gap that opens when an LLM has done the work on the human's behalf.

entry.title: xyo-skills
entry.content: Full-stack agent skills for building dApps on the XL1 blockchain. Covers XYO primitives, XL1 chain operations, toolchain config, and prescriptive design patterns (commit-reveal, indexing, prediction markets).

entry.title: piflow
entry.content: Pi Flow — author, enhance, and run structured filesystem-coordinated workflows (a DAG of producer/verify nodes) as a fleet of efficient pi agents driven by non-Claude coding-plan models, with Claude Code as the single console. Three skills: piflow-init (create a workflow), piflow-enhance (improve it), piflow-start (run + monitor it).

entry.title: claude-code-statusline
entry.content: Multi-provider statusline for Claude Code — DeepSeek ¥ tracking, opencode go subscription usage, Anthropic context bar. TrueColor gradient, git porcelain, code churn.

entry.title: apple-mail
entry.content: Manage Apple Mail through natural language - read, search, send, and organize emails (macOS only)

entry.title: claude-code-config
entry.content: Ed Chapman's personal Claude Code configuration: specialist agents, workflow skills, settings & MCP templates, hooks, and code-style rules. Distributable as a plugin or symlinkable as a global config repo.

entry.title: iterm2-tab-status
entry.content: Show iTerm2 tab status (running/idle/attention) for Claude Code sessions

entry.title: code-quality-atlas
entry.content: A research-derived suite of 33 code-review and maintenance skills covering correctness, readability, structure, security, performance, tests, migrations, accessibility, observability, LLM and agentic/tool-use safety, install/upgrade experience, authored-artifact conventions (e.g. SKILL.md), and repo-wide audits (architecture, dependencies, config, docs, compliance), plus a router that picks the right lenses for a given change or design doc and a synthesizer that merges their findings into one ranked verdict. Each skill is generated from a verified research atlas with provenance, refined examples, and cross-model evals.

entry.title: taskyou
entry.content: Install and manage TaskYou — a personal task management system with Kanban board, background AI execution, and git worktree isolation.

entry.title: devkit
entry.content: Local-dev coordination skills for devkit: file locks, ports, dev servers, issue lifecycle

entry.title: shippo
entry.content: Ship packages with Shippo. Multi-carrier rate shopping, label generation, package tracking, address validation, customs declarations, and batch processing from CSV files.

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: cc-skills-utils
entry.content: Utility skills for Claude Code — discovery, git operations, plugin management, and general tooling.

entry.title: epic-creator
entry.content: Decompose RHAISTRAT strategies into implementation epic DAGs with adversarial review

entry.title: comment-io
entry.content: Comment.io skills, an engineering delivery workflow (plan, prototype, build, review, ship) over a live Comment.io worklog, botlet workspaces, and CLI notification checks for Claude Code

entry.title: groundwork
entry.content: SDLC discipline workflows for Claude Code — requirements, planning, and structured development practices

entry.title: autopilot
entry.content: Development autopilot — 23 lifecycle skills + 3 methodology agents + 21 hooks (8 default-on, 13 opt-in) enforcing Three Red Lines discipline. Standalone-capable orchestration that coexists with Superpowers.

entry.title: job-scan
entry.content: Automated job scanning and scoring for IT positions in Sweden. Fetches from JobTech API, scores against your profile with LLM, supports unattended daily runs via claude -p.

entry.title: jclipa-toolkit
entry.content: Project-agnostic, layered skills for Claude Code. Skills define behavior; per-org/repo configuration resolves at runtime via search path.

entry.title: falsegreen-skill
entry.content: LLM-based semantic analysis for false-positive test detection. Applies the J1-J6 judgment framework across Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, and Robot Framework, plus semantic patterns no static tool can see.

entry.title: cc-plugin-audit
entry.content: Detects plugin marketplace updates at session start and flags security-relevant changes for review

entry.title: grepr
entry.content: Skills for managing Grepr jobs and pipelines, building grok parsers, querying log data, and debugging log reduction. Requires the Grepr CLI (npm install -g @grepr/cli).

entry.title: sui-prover
entry.content: Formal verification for Sui Move smart contracts. Write specifications, run the prover, debug verification failures, and understand results.

entry.title: aide
entry.content: AI agent toolkit

entry.title: teacher-operating-system
entry.content: Teacher Operating System (TOS): a hub-and-spoke ecosystem of governed K-12 teacher skills that generate, validate, differentiate, route, and maintain educational artifacts. Skills under skills/ are auto-discovered; shared engines (standards, context, connectors, students, records, docintel, routing, traversal, health) provide the governed core. Offline/stdlib; decision-support with human_review_required; placeholders only in the repo.

entry.title: kata-flight
entry.content: Kata Flight — skill-driven kata issue shipping with roborev review handling and optional RDR process binding. Ships the /kata-* and /roborev-* wrapper skills plus RDR binding skills for projects that use an external RDR process.

entry.title: focused-review
entry.content: Auto-generates review rules from instruction files and runs parallel code reviews

entry.title: dev-flow
entry.content: Unified development workflow — project onboarding, dependency audit, code review, changelog generation, decision recording, and cross-session memory in one integrated plugin.

entry.title: test-gen
entry.content: Test generator — automatically generate unit tests, integration tests, test fixtures, and test coverage reports from code.

entry.title: refactor
entry.content: Code refactoring — analyze code for refactoring opportunities, suggest patterns, generate plans, execute safely, and verify results.

entry.title: outreach
entry.content: 学术套磁全流程自动化 — 材料解析、教授调研、可视化报告、个性化邮件生成、邮件收发。

entry.title: security-audit
entry.content: Security audit — scan for hardcoded secrets, check vulnerable dependencies, analyze code for security issues, and generate security reports.

entry.title: doc-gen
entry.content: Documentation generator — automatically generate API docs, README files, architecture documentation, changelogs, and contributor guidelines from code.

entry.title: perf-profile
entry.content: Performance profiling — analyze code for bottlenecks, profile execution time, identify memory leaks, and generate performance reports.

entry.title: incident-response
entry.content: Structured incident response workflow — triage, diagnose, fix, verify, postmortem. Timeline tracking, root cause analysis, and automated postmortem generation.

entry.title: migrator
entry.content: Framework and library migration assistant — analyze codebase, identify migration targets, generate step-by-step plans, execute with verification at each step. Handles breaking changes, deprecated APIs, and version upgrades.

entry.title: lit-review
entry.content: Systematic literature review pipeline — multi-source academic search (arXiv, Semantic Scholar, Google Scholar), citation network analysis, subtopic decomposition, and structured review synthesis.

entry.title: team-coord
entry.content: Two subskills for agent team coordination — team-coord:lead orchestrates a team (pure coordinator, never does actual work), team-coord:teammate guides each worker (executes tasks, returns raw findings). Covers inbox sync protocol, WHAT vs HOW spawn philosophy, and unified report synthesis.

entry.title: email
entry.content: 独立邮件收发插件 — 基于 IMAP/SMTP 协议，支持多种邮箱，配置后自动测试连接。

entry.title: atlas
entry.content: Codebase knowledge atlas — multi-agent parallel exploration to map architecture, data flows, dependencies, and patterns. Generates living documentation that stays in sync with code.

entry.title: harness-claude
entry.content: Harness for Claude Code — skills, /harness:* slash commands, persona subagents, lifecycle hooks, and MCP tools without per-repo `harness setup`. Sibling plugins exist for Cursor, Gemini CLI, and Codex.

entry.title: myharness
entry.content: The team-architecture factory for Claude Code and Codex — a meta-skill that turns a domain description into an agent team and the skills they use, with six team patterns (Pipeline, Fan-out/Fan-in, Expert Pool, Producer-Reviewer, Supervisor, Hierarchical Delegation), a two-layer quality gate (internal QA + external codex/agy review), TDD/dev-rules doctrine injection, risk-tiered gates, and dual-runtime output (Claude Code + Codex). Claude Code·Codex용 팀 아키텍처 팩토리: 도메인 한 문장을 에이전트 팀+스킬로 변환하고, 내부 QA + 외부 리뷰 2층 게이트와 듀얼 런타임을 적용하는 메타 스킬.

entry.title: dak
entry.content: This plugin provides a specialized suite of skills for data engineers and database practitioners working on Google Cloud. It acts as an expert assistant, allowing you to use natural language prompts in your preferred coding agent to architect complex data pipelines, transform data with dbt, write Spark and BigQuery SQL notebooks, and orchestrate end-to-end workflows across GCP's data ecosystem.

entry.title: vd
entry.content: A daily-driver collection of skills for agentic coding, namespaced under `vd:` to avoid conflicts with other plugins.

entry.title: gmgn-cli
entry.content: GMGN OpenAPI skills — token info, market data, wallet portfolio, and swap

entry.title: token-optimizer
entry.content: Audit, fix, and monitor Claude Code context window usage. Find the ghost tokens.

entry.title: ap
entry.content: Multi-model tmux pane orchestration for Claude Code — spawn codex/claude/agy/opencode TUIs as attachable parts

entry.title: vruum
entry.content: Vruum AI skills + remote MCP server for managed outbound. Slash commands for prospect enrichment and reply diagnosis, paired with the full Vruum MCP tool surface over OAuth 2.1.

entry.title: stride-ideation
entry.content: Turn a fuzzy idea into a committed requirements doc and Stride tasks via two slash commands — /stride-ideation:ideate and /stride-ideation:stridify.

entry.title: boardwalk
entry.content: Build unsigned Boardwalk transactions (launch, contribute, claim, refund, seed liquidity, stake/unstake BMX, claim staking/participation/fee/vesting rewards, LP add/remove/stake, swap, cast visibility, vote) for an agent's wallet to sign and submit, or generate a prefilled launch link. Drives the boardwalk CLI; non-custodial.

entry.title: coding-skills
entry.content: Coding-convention and workflow skills for Kotlin, Android, and Compose Multiplatform, plus Git, Gradle, and common tooling (Jira, Slack, Figma, Google Workspace)

entry.title: trtc-agent-skills
entry.content: TRTC AI Integration Assistant - helps developers integrate Tencent Real-Time Communication SDKs (Chat, Call, RTC Engine, Live, Conference) across Web, Android, iOS, Flutter, and Electron.
